question: Chapters
feedback: The text identifies two main parts of the thesis – the theoretical and the practical sections – and further subdivides the theoretical part into three sub‑sections. This satisfies the requirement to list the main sections.

question: Description
feedback: While the theoretical part is described in some detail, the practical part is only mentioned without any description of its contents. Therefore the text does not fully meet the requirement to briefly describe each section.

question: Structure
feedback: The overall skeleton (theoretical vs. practical, with three sub‑sections in the theoretical part) is visible, but the absence of any detail about the practical part makes the full structure unclear. The general outline is partially understandable but not complete.
